steps.title: Identify the multiplier for a percentage increase
steps.content: A quantity that is 40% greater than the original equals 100% of the original plus 40%. This is 140% of the original amount, which we express as a multiplier: 1.40. This single multiplication is faster than computing the increase and adding it separately.

steps.title: Multiply the original number of plants by the multiplier
steps.content:
Maya had 45 plants last year. This year the number is:
$$45 \times 1.40 = 63$$
Maya has 63 plants in her garden this year.
